chief_complaint: Beginners in interventional cardiology procedures seeking to improve skills.
history: Cardiology residents at the beginning of their training in interventional cardiology underwent a 4-hour training course on a high-fidelity simulator.
exam: No specific physical examination findings mentioned.
labs: Performance and competence scores improved significantly after the training course, with reduction in irradiation time and procedure time.
correct_diagnosis: Simulation-based training effective for improving skills in interventional cardiology
